title: High-Throughput Assay for Screening Natural Products Enhancing NK Cell Tumoricidal Activity
author: Gong, Ni, et al.
materials: human IFN-γ ELISA MAX™ Deluxe kit

steps.title: Flow Cytometry Analysis
steps.instruction: Cells were incubated with CD56, CD16 and CD3 antibodies conjugated with different fluorophores for 30 min at 4 °C in dark, followed by washing, and resuspension in PBS containing 1 % FBS. Data were acquired using a BD Accuri C6 (BD Biosciences) and analyzed using the FlowJo software (Ashland, OR).

steps.title: Statistical Analysis
steps.instruction: High-throughput screening assay was evaluated by Z’-factor as described previously [29, 30]. Results with Z’-factor below zero were discarded.\documentclass[12pt]{minimal} \usepackage{amsmath} \usepackage{wasysym} \usepackage{amsfonts} \usepackage{amssymb} \usepackage{amsbsy} \usepackage{mathrsfs} \usepackage{upgreek} \setlength{\oddsidemargin}{-69pt} \begin{document}$$ \mathrm{Z}^{\prime }=1-\left(3*\mathrm{S}\mathrm{D}\mathrm{c}++3*\mathrm{S}\mathrm{D}\mathrm{c}-\right)/\left(\mu \mathrm{c}+-\mu \mathrm{c}-\right) $$\end{document}Z′=1−3*SDc++3*SDc−/μc+−μc−

steps.title: Statistical Analysis
steps.instruction: SDc+ standard deviation of IL-2 stimulated NK cell activity

steps.title: Statistical Analysis
steps.instruction: SDc− standard deviation based on level of NK cell activity

steps.title: Statistical Analysis
steps.instruction: μc+ mean of IL-2 stimulated NK cell activity

steps.title: Statistical Analysis
steps.instruction: μc− mean based on level of NK cell activity

steps.title: Statistical Analysis
steps.instruction: Results are expressed as the mean ± SEM. Statistical comparison in two groups was performed by Student’s t-test. P<0.05 represented statistical significant differences.
